subject: Create EvidenceSpan domain builder module
description:
Create `apps/api/src/islam_intelligent/domain/span_builder.py` with:
- create_span(text_unit_id, start_byte, end_byte, text_unit_text) -> dict
- validate_span(span, text_unit_text) -> bool
- extract_snippet(text, start_byte, end_byte) -> str
- compute_snippet_hash(snippet) -> str
- get_prefix_suffix(text, start_byte, end_byte, context=50) -> (prefix, suffix)

Key requirements:
- Use UTF-8 byte offsets (not character offsets)
- Compute sha256 hash of the byte slice
- Validate span boundaries
- Extract context prefix/suffix
